payload.title: PG tests flake under parallel shared-DB schema setup
payload.description: The Postgres test files (pg-schema/replay/store/snapshot) run in parallel processes against one shared database. Concurrent ensureSchema (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS) DDL can transiently fail (e.g. 'tuple concurrently updated' in the catalog), causing an intermittent 1-test failure in the full suite. PG-only, so CI without SCOPE_PG_URL skips it and stays deterministic. Fix: serialize the schema DDL across connections via a pg advisory lock so concurrent ensureSchema calls can't race.
